name: build
description: Clean and build the project for production.

name: validate
description: Run character set checks and data validation.

name: Check Non-ASCII
description: Checks for non-ASCII characters in source files.

name: Tidy Up
description: Launches standard tidy-up for Codex CLI contexts. Agents choose light, standard, full, or push by risk and blast radius; active Codex Desktop sessions should read the tracked workflow doc directly.

name: Tidy Up Light
description: Low-risk tidy-up for docs, comments, local notes, or tiny metadata edits.

name: Tidy Up Full
description: Full tidy-up for shared workflow, tooling, hook, package-script, roadmap, or agent-doc changes.

name: Tidy Up Push
description: Push-readiness tidy-up for sync, intent gate, hook, branch, or worktree checks.

name: Git Hygiene
description: Blocks unchecked local branch/worktree growth and verifies the primary F:/Repos/Aralia tree stays on master.

name: Maintain Icons
description: Workflow to audit and update MDI icons.

name: Stitch Generate
description: Workflow to generate UI using Google Stitch.

name: Extract Terminal Learnings
description: Scans history to update Terminal.md rules.

name: Map R: Drive
description: Re-maps the R: drive if disconnected.
